Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}The home shopping show airs every Sunday afternoon{f 0 1 27}. You can catch it on the TV in your room or on the one in the lounge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The inventory changes every week, and as long as you've got the money, you can buy right from your home. Your delivery will arrive at a later date.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Since you can only watch each show once, you may want to check how much money you have on hand before tuning in.[n]{f 1 1}
